CVE-2019-20176.title: In Pure-FTPd 1.0.49, a stack exhaustion issue was discovered in t ...
CVE-2019-20176.summary: In Pure-FTPd 1.0.49, a stack exhaustion issue was discovered in the listdir function in ls.c.

CVE-2020-35359.title: Pure-FTPd 1.0.48 allows remote attackers to prevent legitimate se ...
CVE-2020-35359.summary: Pure-FTPd 1.0.48 allows remote attackers to prevent legitimate server use by making enough connections to exceed the connection limit.

CVE-2020-9274.title: An issue was discovered in Pure-FTPd 1.0.49. An uninitialized poi ...
CVE-2020-9274.summary: An issue was discovered in Pure-FTPd 1.0.49. An uninitialized pointer vulnerability has been detected in the diraliases linked list. When the *lookup_alias(const char alias) or print_aliases(void) function is called, they fail to correctly detect the end of the linked list and try to access a non-existent list member. This is related to init_aliases in diraliases.c.

CVE-2020-9365.title: An issue was discovered in Pure-FTPd 1.0.49. An out-of-bounds (OO ...
CVE-2020-9365.summary: An issue was discovered in Pure-FTPd 1.0.49. An out-of-bounds (OOB) read has been detected in the pure_strcmp function in utils.c.

CVE-2021-40524.title: In Pure-FTPd before 1.0.50, an incorrect max_filesize quota mecha ...
CVE-2021-40524.summary: In Pure-FTPd before 1.0.50, an incorrect max_filesize quota mechanism in the server allows attackers to upload files of unbounded size, which may lead to denial of service or a server hang. This occurs because a certain greater-than-zero test does not anticipate an initial -1 value. (Versions 1.0.23 through 1.0.49 are affected.)

CVE-2024-48208.title: pure-ftpd before 1.0.52 is vulnerable to Buffer Overflow. There i ...
CVE-2024-48208.summary: pure-ftpd before 1.0.52 is vulnerable to Buffer Overflow. There is an out of bounds read in the domlsd() function of the ls.c file.
